name: SwitchInlineQueryChosenChat
description: This object represents an inline button that switches the current user to inline mode in a chosen chat, with an optional default inline query.

fields.name: query
fields.description: The default inline query to be inserted in the input field. If left empty, only the bot's username will be inserted.

fields.name: allow_user_chats
fields.description: True, if private chats with users can be chosen

fields.name: allow_bot_chats
fields.description: True, if private chats with bots can be chosen

fields.name: allow_group_chats
fields.description: True, if group and supergroup chats can be chosen

fields.name: allow_channel_chats
fields.description: True, if channel chats can be chosen
